content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:FromtheAdventuresofLukeSkywalker.png|thumb|200px|[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars: From the Adventures of Luke Skywalker'']]]]
A list of events related to ''[[Star Wars]]'' in '''1976'''.

==January==
*[[January 6|06]] – [[Johnny Yong Bosch]] is born.
*[[January 15|15]] – The Revised Fourth Draft of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].
*[[January 29|29]] – [[Ryan Kelly]] is born.

==February==
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Sharon Duncan-Brewster]] is born.
*[[February 23|23]] – [[Kelly Macdonald]] is born.

==March==
*[[March 8|08]] – [[Freddie Prinze Jr.]] is born.
*[[March 10|10]] – [[Gordy Haab]] is born.
*[[March 15|15]] – [[Cara Pifko]] is born.
*[[March 21|21]] – [[Rachael MacFarlane]] is born.
*[[March 22|22]] – Filming starts for ''A New Hope''.
*[[March 23|23]] – [[Keri Russell]] is born.
*[[March 30|30]] – [[Matt Doran]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – [[Troy Baker]] is born.
*01 – [[David Oyelowo]] is born.
*[[April 2|02]] – Filming in [[Ajim]] starts.
*[[April 3|03]] – Filming in [[Ajim]] finishes.
*[[April 22|22]] – [[Misty Lee]] is born.
*22 – [[Chuck Wendig]] is born.
*[[April 27|27]] – [[Sally Hawkins]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 11|11]] – [[Stephen Scaia]] is born.
*[[May 28|28]] – [[Liam O'Brien]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 11|11]] – [[Nick Kellington]] is born.
*[[June 12|12]] – [[Zach Hanks]] is born.
*[[June 29|29]] – [[Michael Atiyeh]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 4|04]] – [[Rohan Nichol]] is born.
*[[July 5|05]] – [[Jamie Elman]] is born.
*[[July 16|16]] – Filming for ''A New Hope'' is finished.

==August==
*[[August 11|11]] – [[Jesse Harlin]] is born.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[Donald Mustard]] is born.
*[[August 24|24]] – [[Rebecca Soler]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 6|06]] – [[Robin Atkin Downes]] is born.
*[[September 13|13]] – [[Colin Trevorrow]] is born.
*[[September 20|20]] – [[Enuka Okuma]] is born.
*20 – [[Michael Kogge]] is born.

==October==
*[[October 9|9]] – [[Sam Riegel]] is born.
*[[October 11|11]] – [[Holly Fields]] is born.
*[[October 24|24]] – [[Amy Allen]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 12|12]] – [[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars: From the Adventures of Luke Skywalker'']] published.
*[[November 18|18]] – [[Dominic Armato]] is born.
*Fox releases the first trailer for ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==December==
*[[December 8|8]] – [[Dominic Monaghan]] is born.
*[[December 28|28]] – [[Joe Manganiello]] is born.
*[[December 31|31]] – [[Chris Terrio]] is born.

==Unknown==
*[[Derek Connolly]] is born.
*[[Tom Huddleston]] is born.
*[[Bodie Taylor]] is born.

----
{{Years-RealWorld}}

}}
